name: Vitamin C
description: Vitamin C (L-ascorbic acid) is a potent antioxidant that neutralizes free radical damage from UV exposure and pollution. It brightens dull skin, fades hyperpigmentation, and supports collagen synthesis for firmer, more radiant skin. Best used in the morning under sunscreen for maximum photoprotective benefits.

relatedProducts.name: Beauty of Joseon Relief Sun Rice + Probiotics
